seoTitle: Fish Point vs Fitzroy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fish Point and Fitzroy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fish Point vs Fitzroy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fish Point and Fitzroy.
heading: Fish Point vs Fitzroy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fish Point, Victoria and Fitzroy, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fish Point has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Fitzroy (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fish Point or Fitzroy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fish Point has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Fitzroy scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fish Point scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Fitzroy scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fish Point or Fitzroy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fish Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
